utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check each for full specification: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, type, size, bedrooms, features, move-in date, monthly maintenance, bike storage, pet deposit) — fully specified. 2) financing: financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, down payment, interest rate, term, monthly payment, fees, status) — fully specified. 3) legal_services: legal services with costs (lawyer named, conveyancing fee, land transfer tax, home inspection, included services, timeline) — costs and scope provided — fully specified. 4) moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (company, cost items, date, services included) — fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services (package cost, which utilities included, connection date; plus community integration) — fully specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown (price, down payment, closing costs breakdown line items and total, monthly costs) — fully specified. Therefore all 6/6 are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to categories in the ground-truth ratings: a purchase property described as a Commercial Conversion Loft in Liberty Village (maps to 'Commercial Conversion' under purchase_properties), a financing approach consistent with a first-time buyer mortgage (arrangement fee CAD $800, pre-approved; maps to 'First-Time Buyer' under purchase_financing), legal services priced at CAD $800 (maps to 'Basic Legal Package'), a home inspection at CAD $400 (maps to 'New Build Inspection' or inspections list; however the closest explicit named item at CAD $400 is 'New Build Inspection' but since the property is a conversion, more appropriate is 'Basic Survey' at CAD $300; the solution states $400, which matches 'New Build Inspection' rating 7. We'll map exactly by name when present: 'home_inspection' is generic; the ground-truth item that matches the price given is 'New Build Inspection'), moving services priced at CAD $650 with packing etc. (maps to 'Standard Moving'), and a utility package at CAD $280 (maps to 'Premium Utilities'). The solution also includes 'Community Integration' at CAD $250, which maps to 'Community Integration' under local_area_integration.
